items.title: The Dallas Mavericks are waiving two-way forward Tyler Smith, league sources told HoopsHype. Smith averaged 4.7 points in 13.8 minutes per game during 12 games played for Dallas last season. Smith was originally the 33rd pick of the 2024 NBA Draft by the Milwaukee Bucks.
